in_scope: T-017 theme toggle fix (included at user request): add @rendermode InteractiveServer to AppThemeToggle.razor (the layout cannot be marked InteractiveServer; its @Body is a RenderFragment delegate that Blazor refuses to serialize across the SSR -> interactive boundary; declaring the directive on the toggle itself is the minimum-blast-radius fix); add the AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests bUnit test that asserts the click handler is wired when the layout is rendered (not the toggle in isolation)

Empty routes: every route in Components/Pages/ reaches an AppEmptyState (or its data-owning equivalent); the AppCard + AppEmptyState composition is repeated only twice (Home.razor and NotFound.razor), so the AppEmptyRouteCard primitive is not introduced per the plan's >3 rule

Responsive matrix: the layout is usable at 1280x720, 1440x900, and 1920x1080; below 1280px the sidebar narrows progressively (8rem at 1024-1279px); the top bar remains horizontal at every breakpoint; the content area scrolls vertically (overflow-y: auto)

Accessibility audit: keyboard smoke test (Tab reachable, focusable buttons and anchors, default focus styles); aria-current=page invariant (breadcrumb last segment + NavLink active state + sidebar active link); axe-core audit (registered, disabled per ADR-016 / M4-D)
docs/ui-principles.md § 10.1: responsive matrix documented with the M2.5 implementation
Project-continuity state updates (current.md, task-board.md, session.json, tasks.json, milestones.json, capabilities.json, ROADMAP.md, handoffs/latest.md)
Single coherent commit feat(m2.5): add empty routes, responsive matrix, a11y audit, and theme toggle fix
out_of_scope: M2.6 (the M2 closeout and Treehouse dogfooding checkpoint)
axe-core activation (the harness is registered but disabled; the activation milestone is M4-D per ADR-016)
Mobile viewport support below 1024px (per ADR-005, the M2 primary viewport is 1280x720 minimum; the M8 closeout adds the full responsive matrix)

Adding icons to all sidebar routes (the icon-rail collapse at <1024px is a future enhancement once every sidebar route carries an Icon; per ADR-005 and the M2 primary viewport, this is M8 closeout scope)
Pushing (no remote configured; push is skipped per the brief)

last_action.outcome: M2.5 delivered 2026-07-11: empty routes (Home.razor + NotFound.razor reach AppEmptyState with /dashboard and /design-system links); responsive matrix (AppLayout.razor.css @media rules for lg/md/sm breakpoints; docs/ui-principles.md § 10.1 documents the matrix); a11y audit (KeyboardSmokeTests + AriaCurrentInvariantTests + AxeCoreAuditTests registered but skipped per ADR-016 / M4-D); T-017 theme toggle fix (@rendermode InteractiveServer added to AppThemeToggle.razor; the layout itself remains static for streaming SSR; the new AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests bUnit test asserts the click handler is wired when the layout is rendered). 18 new component tests + 3 new architecture tests (skipped). Total: 197 passing + 7 skipped, 0 failed. Visual smoke test: every route returns 200; the theme toggle's markup is present on every page.

intended_next_action: Stop. The M2.6 closeout session follows per the Progressive Coding Rule. The M2.6 plan stub is recorded in task-board.md and milestones.json as Deferred; the next session promotes the M2.6 plan stub to a full plan in Awaiting Approval, then implements per the plan's own order (M2 closeout template + Treehouse dogfooding checkpoint + M3 plan preparation). Do NOT begin M2.6 in this session.
session_notes: M2.5 closeout session (2026-07-11). The M2.5 plan was approved by the user on 2026-07-11 with the T-017 theme toggle bug fix included in the same slice. The session implements the M2.5 slice per the plan (.ai/plans/M2.5-empty-routes-responsive-accessibility.md) starting with the T-017 fix. Two documented deviations: (1) the T-017 fix was applied to AppThemeToggle.razor (not AppLayout.razor as the plan's primary path) because the layout's @Body is a RenderFragment delegate, which Blazor refuses to serialize across the SSR -> interactive boundary; the layout rejects the @rendermode directive with InvalidOperationException. The plan § 1 explicitly allowed this fallback ('If the layout must remain static for streaming SSR reasons, mark AppTopBar.razor + AppThemeToggle.razor as Interactive instead and add a comment explaining why'). (2) The plan's responsive matrix mentions 'sidebar collapses to an icon rail below 1280px'; the implementation narrows the sidebar progressively (8rem at 1024-1279px) but does not collapse to an icon rail because most sidebar routes do not carry an Icon (only Dashboard does). The icon-rail collapse is a future enhancement once every sidebar route carries an Icon; per ADR-005 and the M2 primary viewport (1280x720 minimum), the M2.5 implementation is usable at 1280x720 and above. The session follows the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; 13-step lifecycle; stop after the coherent commit. Push is skipped (no remote).

M2.4 implementation session. The M2.4 plan was approved by the user on 2026-07-11. The session implements the M2.4 slice per the plan (.ai/plans/M2.4-project-intelligence-dashboard.md). The session also addresses the theme toggle bug: the M2.3 AppThemeToggle's state must propagate to the documentElement.data-theme attribute so light/dark switching is visible immediately, persists across navigation and browser refresh, and remains consistent throughout the application. The session follows the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; 13-step lifecycle; stop after the coherent commit. The session does NOT implement M2.5 (only the M2.5 plan is promoted to Awaiting Approval). Push is skipped (no remote).
